rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARY JAN CHOW YEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: continued to 6/27/17 for proper notice of the amendment. notice was mailed 5/23, but the petition was not filed until 5/24. Notice may not be mailed before the filing of the petiiton requiring notice (LR 14.21.A.). 5/24/17 to 6/7/17 is only 14 days. if notice is mailed no later than 6/12/17 and the Notice of Hearing/Proof of Service filed no later than wednesday, 6/21/17, the matter will be heard on 6/27/17.
